channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: CA lawmakers introduce bill protecting girls from trans athletes after state refuses to follow Trump's order
item.description: California lawmakers introduced three bills aimed to combat trans inclusion after the state said it won't comply with the Trump administration on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cam Newton doubles down on saying Panthers had 'locker room of losers' prior to drafting him
item.description: Former Carolina star quarterback Cam Newton doubled down on recent comments that the Panthers had “a locker room of losers” before drafting him with the No. 1 overall pick in 2011, saying his remarks were “aggressive” but “true.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles star CJ Gardner-Johnson delivers crude message to Taylor Swift fans at Super Bowl parade
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles safety C.J. Gardner-Johnson wore a hoodie with a crude message directed at Taylor Swift fans to the Eagles' Super Bowl parade on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women’s college basketball: Big wins for Cal, Stanford and Santa Clara as regular season winds down; Saint Mary’s upset bid thwarted
item.description: Cal Bears crack 20-victory mark for the first time since 2019 with win over Boston College; Stanford snaps losing streak with blowout home win over Syracuse
item.dc:creator: Mercury News staff and wire reports, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 1 UCLA ends its run as nation's lone unbeaten team with upset loss to crosstown rival USC
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The unbeaten streak is over for UCLA. The top-ranked Bruins lost 71-60 to sixth-ranked USC and JuJu Watkins on Thursday night, ending their school-record run of 23 consecutive victories to open the season. They were the nation’s last undefeated women’s team.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strength in numbers: New Red Sox righty Walker Buehler sees club joining trend of Dodgers
item.description: FORT MYERS, Fla. (AP) — Walker Buehler won a World Series last year with the Los Angeles Dodgers, a team that’s stocked with starting pitching. He left as a free agent for a $21.05 million, one-year contract with the Boston Red Sox, a team also trying to loading up on starting arms.
item.dc:creator: BY KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Marcus Stroman reports to Yankees camp and insists he won't go to the bullpen
item.description: Marcus Stroman has reported to New York Yankees spring training after missing the first two days of workouts and said he will refuse to pitch out of the bullpen.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: With tears flowing, Dale Earnhardt Jr. gets another shot at the Daytona 500 as a team owner
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Dale Earnhardt Jr. blinked back tears as the moment hit him at Daytona International Speedway — a track bursting with triumph and tragedy for his family — that he was, with a country star and a NASCAR champ in tow, back in the Daytona 500.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban invites fan ejected for 'Fire Nico' protest back to sit courtside
item.description: Dallas Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban invited a fan back to sit courtside after he and several others were ejected from a game earlier this week for protesting the Luka Doncic trade,
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Moore is bullish on the Saints, but noncommittal on Carr, as his 1st head-coaching gig starts
item.description: METAIRIE, La. (AP) — Kellen Moore figures his upbringing as a coach's son outweighs any concerns about his relative youth as he begins his first NFL head coaching job with the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Marcus Stroman a no-show for New York Yankees' first two workouts
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Marcus Stroman has been a no-show on the field for the New York Yankees' first two spring training workouts. Stroman isn’t required to participate in spring training until Feb. 22, the mandatory reporting date under the collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz turn the tables on Lakers in 131-119 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - What a difference 48 hours make. On Monday, the L.A. Lakers blew away the Utah Jazz in Luka Doncic' Laker debut. But Wednesday in Salt Lake City, it was all Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Tems joins San Diego FC ownership group
item.description: On Wednesday, SDFC announced two-time Grammy Award-winning and Oscar nominated singer-songwriter Tems has joined the ownership group as a club partner.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Madsen scores 28, but Utes lose at Cincinnati
item.description: CINCINNATI (ABC4 Sports) - Despite 28 points from Gabe Madsen against his former team, the Runnin' Utes fell at Cincinnati Tuesday night, 85-75. Madsen, who began his college career with the Bearcats, made eight three-pointers on 22 attempts, in matching a season high point total.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago State begins search for head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The South Side's Chicago State University launched a search to find their first head football coach Tuesday. “We are excited to reach this milestone in our football planning.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-MLB player Jacque Jones has high school jersey retired
item.description: Jacque Jones, a former Major League Baseball outfielder and San Diego native, had his legacy cemented in his alma mater's history on Saturday with the official retirement of his jersey number.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Taylor Swift booed by heavily pro-Eagles crowd at the Super Bowl
item.description: Taylor Swift was back at the Super Bowl to watch Travis Kelce and his Kansas City Chiefs play the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday. Her reception was a whole lot different than last year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A presidential first: Trump at the Super Bowl, latest chapter in a complicated legacy with football
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — As a student, Donald Trump played high school football. As a business baron, he owned a team in an upstart rival to the NFL and then sued the established league. As president, he denigrated pros who took a knee during the national anthem as part of a social justice movement.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Jets tell Aaron Rodgers they're 'moving on' from the QB for next season, report says
item.description: Aaron Rodgers is still contemplating whether to continue his playing career. If he does, it appears it won’t be with the New York Jets. The team has told the 41-year-old quarterback it is “moving on from him,” Fox Sports reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump picks Chiefs for Super Bowl win, praising Mahomes
item.description: “I guess, you have to say that when a quarterback wins as much as he’s won, I have to go with Kansas City,” Trump told Fox News’s Bret Baier.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce spotted out in New Orleans
item.description: New Orleans resident Geoff Jacques said he saw Swift and Kelce as well as Patrick Mahomes and his wife who were with Swift and Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Lopez, NewsNation

item.title: Clippers dominate fourth quarter in win over Jazz
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Los Angeles Clippers broke open a close game in the fourth quarter, outscoring the Jazz 36-24, en route to a 130-110 win over Utah Saturday night. Jordan Clarkson led the Jazz with 24 points, while Keyonte George added 21 off the bench.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry scores 34 points, Butler adds 25 in Golden State debut as Warriors rally to beat Bulls 132-111
item.description: Stephen Curry scored 34 points and tied a season high with eight 3-pointers, Jimmy Butler added 25 points in his Golden State debut and the Warriors rallied to beat the Chicago Bulls 132-111 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The most expensive merch we found at the Super Bowl
item.description: We all know attending the Super Bowl is super pricey endeavor, but be prepared to shell out some serious cash if you're looking for fancy merch.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, NewsNation

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
